Nanjing Huamai Technology Co., Ltd. is a highly prominent, publicly listed (A-share) enterprise operating as a Tier-1 supplier and comprehensive solutions provider in China's telecommunications infrastructure sector. Established in 1998, it boasts a massive paid-in capital of over 100 Million RMB and employs 348 insured personnel at its core Jiangning manufacturing base. Its extraordinarily detailed business scope reveals a dual-engine corporate strategy: 1) Heavy hardware manufacturing (optical fiber distribution systems, base station antennas, telecom cables, and power supply equipment) and 2) Advanced engineering and software integration (telecom network integration, data center construction, smart city IT services, and value-added telecom operations). As a listed entity, it represents a major anchor point in the Yangtze River Delta's optical communication and 5G/IoT infrastructure ecosystem.
